title: ocellochloa soderstromii
intro: Ocellochloa soderstromii, a species of grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Peru. The medicinal properties of Ocellochloa soderstromii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Ocellochloa soderstromii can be made by drying and grinding the leaves or roots, and then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or infusion for medicinal use.
